xiaozhi_mcp_wifi_init.tooltip: Connect WiFi and generate an auto-reconnect helper

xiaozhi_mcp_init.tooltip: Initialize the WebSocket MCP client, for example wss://api.xiaozhi.me/mcp/?token=your_token

xiaozhi_mcp_loop.tooltip: Call in loop to process MCP messages and periodically check WiFi

xiaozhi_mcp_register_tool.tooltip: Register an MCP tool. Parameter blocks must appear before this block, and the handler block must use the same tool name.

xiaozhi_mcp_add_tool_param.message0: Add parameter to tool %1 name %2 parameter description %3 type %4 details %5
xiaozhi_mcp_add_tool_param.tooltip: Add an input parameter to a named MCP tool; inputSchema is generated when the tool is registered

xiaozhi_mcp_on_tool.message0: When MCP receives tool %1 call %2 do %3
xiaozhi_mcp_on_tool.tooltip: Define code to run when the named MCP tool is called. Tool name must match the register tool block.

xiaozhi_mcp_get_string.tooltip: Read a string from current tool-call arguments

xiaozhi_mcp_get_number.tooltip: Read a number from current tool-call arguments

xiaozhi_mcp_get_bool.tooltip: Read a boolean from current tool-call arguments

xiaozhi_mcp_return_result.tooltip: Set the JSON result for current tool call
